context: Tests whether the agent writes an executor that returns { success: boolean }, uses package notation, and declares outputs in the target registration for Nx cache correctness.

checklist.name: Executor returns { success: boolean }
checklist.description: executor.ts returns an object with a success boolean field — not void, not a string, not a number

checklist.name: schema.json has typed outputPath field
checklist.description: schema.json defines outputPath as a required string with type and description

checklist.name: Package notation used in target example
checklist.description: target-example.json uses executor: '@myorg/tools:compile' (package notation), not a relative path

checklist.name: outputs declared in target example
checklist.description: target-example.json includes an outputs array (e.g., ['{options.outputPath}']) so Nx can cache the task correctly

checklist.name: Executor handles success/failure
checklist.description: executor.ts returns { success: false } on error and { success: true } on completion — not just a happy path
